summary: All 7 test cases GREEN. Fixture dogfood: merged entry (A+B) synthesized correctly — slug-prefixed diagrams, members[] in manifest, no diagrams.html, idempotent re-run, feature C untouched. Single-slug (C): same slim shape via same writer. Schema: all 12 real manifests valid; unknown-key rejection intact. Classifier: members[] detection works; malformed manifest skipped safely. Viewer: slug-prefix pairing confirmed correct. FR4: plugin.json=0.8.0, 12 commands, board.py unchanged+selftest PASS, no stale wording. One nit TEST-001 (gogo-view <kind> variable naming ambiguity, non-blocking — behavior is correct).
